subHeader: Get quick access to 3D model vizualizations with dynamic data overlays for instant and convenient analysis
programFeaturesSubHeader: The program allows you to upload files to build models and analyze data. Users can visualize the model and use interactive tools for detailed viewing.

section1.body: The program allows you to upload files with node coordinates and element faces to build the model. Additionally, files with displacements, stress and other characteristic may be uploaded.

section2.body: Based on the uploaded data, the program automatically creates the model. Users can visualize stresses, displacements, etc. Switching modes allows analyzing the model at different levels of detail.

section3.body: Users can toggle the visibility of nodes and select an individual node. When user hovers over a node, an info window with all available information about the node appears for more convenient data analysis.
